sections.paragraph:
ὑψηλόφρων, ον, gen. ονος (Eur., Pla.; Cass. Dio 72, 8, 3=‘high-minded, high-spirited’) proud, haughty (so Pollux 9, 147; Eustath., Opuscula 23, 60 p. 209, 96; the adv. Pel.-Leg. 22, 31) Hs 8, 9, 1.—DELG s.v. ὕψι.

gen. gen. = genitive

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Pollux Pollux , II a.d.—List 5

Eustath Eustath , XII a.d.—List 5

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Pel.-Leg. Pel.-Leg. = Legenden der heiligen Pelagia, V? a.d.—List 5

Hs Hs = Similitudes

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1045
